maps.title: MAP: Be Bank of India (Commercial
maps.objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be Bank of India (Commercial
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be Bank of India (Commercial'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be Bank of India (Commercial
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Commercial
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India (Commercial'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Bank of India (Commercial
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Bank of India (Commercial' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Bank of India (Commercial
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Bank of India (Commercial'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.objective: To ensure come into force from january 1, 2026, or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy ("effective date")

or from any earlier date as decided by a bank as per its internal policy ("effective date").

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Come January 1, 2026, or
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Come January 1, 2026, or'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Come January 1, 2026, or
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Come January 1, 2026, or' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Come January 1, 2026, or

tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Come January 1, 2026, or' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Board/Board Committee at periodic
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Board/Board Committee at periodic'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Board/Board Committee at periodi
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Board/Board Committee at periodic' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Board/Board Committee at pe
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Board/Board Committee at periodic'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
